saints.name: Leavetaking of the Theophany of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ

troparion.text: When You, O Lord were baptized in the Jordan / the worship of the Trinity was made manifest / for the voice of the Father bore witness to You / and called You His beloved Son. / And the Spirit, in the form of a dove, / confirmed the truthfulness of His word. / O Christ, our God, You have revealed Yourself / and have enlightened the world, glory to You!

kontakion.text: Today You have shown forth to the world, O Lord, / and the light of Your countenance has been marked on us. / Knowing You, we sing Your praises. / You have come and revealed Yourself, / O unapproachable Light.

saints.name: Saint Savva I, first Archbishop of Serbia

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Savva, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
O Hierarch Savva, divine thunder, spiritual trumpet, /   planter of faith and pruner of heresies, great favorite of the Trinity, /   while standing with the Angels before God,  /  pray unceasingly for us all.

saints.name: Holy Monastic Fathers slain at Sinai and Raithu

troparion.text: O God of our Fathers,  /  always act with kindness towards us;  /  do not take Your mercy from us,  / but direct our lives in peace  / through the prayers of these Saints.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
Fleeing from the world's confusion and turbulence,  / you passed over to a state of serenity,  /  crowned with the blood of martyrdom and the pains of your ascetical contests.  / Therefore, you were shown to dwell with the Martyrs and the Venerable Fathers.

saints.name: Saint Nino (Nina), Equal of the Apostles, Enlightener of Georgia

troparion.text: O handmaiden of the Word of God,  / who equaled the first-called Apostle Andrew in preaching,  / and emulated the other Apostles;  / enlightener of Iberia and lyre of the Holy Spirit,  / Holy equal of the Apostles Nina, pray to Christ God for the salvation of our souls.

kontakion.text: Come, all of you, let us sing praises today to the one chosen by Christ,  / the equal of the Apostles, the preacher of God's Word,  / the wise bearer of good tidings, who brought the people of Kartli to the path of life and truth;  / she is the disciple of the Mother of God,  / our zealous intercessor and unsleeping guardian, /  the all-praised Nina.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Joseph, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Venerable Theodulus, son of Venerable Nilus of Sinai

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Theodulus, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Venerable Stephen, Abbot of Khenolakkos Monastery, near Chalcedon

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Stephen, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Saint Kentigern, first Bishop of Glasgow, Scotland

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Kentigern, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
O Hierarch Kentigern, divine thunder, spiritual trumpet, /   planter of faith and pruner of heresies, great favorite of the Trinity, /   while standing with the Angels before God,  /  pray unceasingly for us all.

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Meletios, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

saints.name: Hieromartyr Platon, the first Bishop of Estonia, and all the New Martyrs of Estonia

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “O citizen of the desert...”)
Let all the faithful honor Platon, the illustrious Hierarch,  / the august prize-winner, and divinely-honored leader of Estonia, with hymns and spiritual songs; /  for he bestows gifts upon the faithful who cry to him:  / "Glory to Him Who gave you strength. /  Glory to Him Who crowned you.  / Glory to Him Who, through you, grants healing to all.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You have appeared today...”)
Today Estonia celebrates the Hierarch Platon, /  and with him, the devout and courageous New Martyrs /  who
glorified Christ as the Lover of mankind.
